name: Prosciutto Di Parma with Baked Stuffed Figs
recipeIngredient: 12 figs, cut open at top but left whole at base
6 oz Gorgonzola cheese, softened to room temperature
2 bunches Italian parsley, finely chopped to yield 1/2 cup
8 oz Prosciutto di Parma, sliced paper thin
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450°F.
Place figs on a non-greased baking sheet, opening them with fingers as best you can. In a mixing bowl, stir together Gorgonzola cheese, chopped walnuts and chopped parsley until well mixed. Using a tablespoon, stuff each fig with about one tablespoon of the filling.
Bake figs for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the cheese filling is bubbling out. Meanwhile, lay three or four slices of Prosciutto on each of four plates.
Remove figs from oven and place three in the center of each plate. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
